## Quick wins to raise closed ratio

Close with a short comment (not planned / discussion / duplicate):

1. **#24** — funding links belong in README or community profile, not plugin code.
2. Any duplicate or superseded reports after checking release **1.0.0** changelog.

Use **Feature Request** template for new ideas so bugs stay separate.
